history.content: Hey claw - can you set a reminder for me - send me a message everyday at 10:25 - with an upbeat message to motivate em throughout the day
Just to confirm: should I create a recurring “Daily 10:25 AM upbeat reminder” job that sends you an upbeat motivational message every day at 10:25 AM (EST)?
Just to confirm: should I create a recurring “Daily 10:25 PM upbeat reminder” job that sends you an upbeat motivational message every evening at 10:25 PM EST?
Scheduled the “Daily 10:25 PM upbeat reminder” job to send you an evening motivational message every night at 10:25 PM EST.
